problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: The key to How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? is mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression — specifically mRNA therapy to — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
